title: Migration Decisions Contract
description: The ONLY artifact the LLM produces for code-generation stages. Consumed together with analysis.json (IR) by emit_tmdl.py and emit_pbir.py. Every field the parser could not resolve deterministically is filled here by an agent.

suppressTextZones.description: When true, standalone Tableau text tiles (page titles, section labels, floating table-header strips, legend captions) are NOT emitted as textbox visuals. Power BI visuals carry their own titles and the filter panel emits its own group labels, so these tiles are usually redundant clutter.

source.description: template = from map_dax.py, llm = agent authored

visualDecisions.description: Resolves IR worksheets where inferredVisualType was null (ambiguous).

visualType.description: Power BI visualType e.g. barChart, tableEx, slicer, card

fieldParameters.description: Power BI field parameters that swap a visual's axis/value (reproduces Tableau parameter-driven Monthly/Daily or Bar/Table toggles).

name.description: field parameter table + column name (e.g. 'Date Granularity')

appliesTo.description: Worksheet names whose axis this parameter drives; the first is kept as the live chart, the rest are suppressed as duplicates.

fields.description: Ordered selectable fields; the first is the default.

navBar.description: Navigation bar configuration. When omitted or null, the nav bar is generated automatically for multi-page reports using default colors and vertical orientation.

enabled.description: Set false to suppress the nav bar entirely (e.g. single-dashboard reports, embedded use-cases).

orientation.description: Layout direction. 'vertical' = left sidebar strip (default). 'horizontal' = side-by-side top-right header bar (matches Tableau goto-sheet button rows).

activeColor.description: Hex fill color for the button representing the current page (highlighted/active state). Default: #1F77B4.

inactiveColor.description: Hex fill color for buttons that navigate to other pages. Default: #2C3E50.

buttonWidth.description: Override button width in pixels. Derived from Tableau zone width scaled to the PBI canvas (zoneW/100000 * pageW). Auto-computed when omitted.

buttonHeight.description: Override button height in pixels. Derived from Tableau zone height scaled to the PBI canvas (zoneH/100000 * pageH). Auto-computed when omitted.

buttonGap.description: Gap in pixels between adjacent buttons. 0 = flush (matching Tableau). Default vertical=2, horizontal=0.

originX.description: X pixel position of the first button. Derived from Tableau zone x scaled to PBI canvas. Default vertical=2, horizontal=940.

originY.description: Y pixel position of the first button. Derived from Tableau zone y scaled to PBI canvas. Default vertical=2, horizontal=6.

filterPanel.description: Bookmark-driven filter panel (slide-out drawer) configuration. Reproduces the Tableau 'Show/Close Dashboard Filters' toggle. When omitted or null, a panel is generated automatically for any page that has slicer visuals: a dark drawer behind the slicers, a 'FILTERS' header, a hamburger (open) button and an X (close) button, plus a Show/Hide bookmark pair per page.

enabled.description: Set false to suppress the filter panel toggle entirely (slicers then remain permanently visible on the page).

panelColor.description: Hex background color of the slide-out drawer. Default: #0D2A36 (dark teal, matching the Tableau source).

slicerHeaderColor.description: Hex color applied to the slicer header labels inside the drawer (and their backgrounds made transparent) so they read on the dark panel. Default: #FFFFFF (white).

sectionLabelColor.description: Hex color of the section group labels (e.g. PRODUCT / LOCATION) inside the container. Default: #24C6FC (cyan, matching the Tableau source).

sections.description: Ordered group structure for the filter container, mirroring the Tableau 'Vertical Cont. (Filter)' drawer. When supplied, the drawer becomes a full-height right-edge container and the slicers are stacked vertically under their group label. Slicers are matched to groups by their bound field name; any unmatched slicers are appended label-less. When omitted, the panel is a flat backdrop behind the slicers' existing positions.

label.description: Section header text (e.g. 'PRODUCT'). Null renders the group with no header (e.g. a top-of-panel parameter slicer).

fields.description: Bound field/column names of the slicers that belong to this section, in display order.

padding.description: Pixels of padding drawn around the slicer bounding box when sizing the drawer rectangle. Default: 16.

slicerNames.description: Explicit visual names that make up the drawer contents. When omitted, every visual whose visualType is 'slicer' on a page is auto-detected as drawer content.

openButton.description: Geometry of the hamburger (open) toggle button. Derived from the Tableau toggle-button zone scaled to the PBI canvas. When omitted, placed at the top-right of the page.

x.description: X pixel position of the open button.

y.description: Y pixel position of the open button.
